title: Restrict options in Multi select question (Forms)

posts.author: Benary_Properties (Benary Properties)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2025-04-28 141118309×502 18.1 KB

I want to have the ability to restrict other options ones specific option was choose.

In the example I provide, once the first option is choose all the other are irrelevant.
I don’t want the customer have multiple options select including the “All” option.

Can we find a solution for that,
thanks
